# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test

    - name: Build project
      run: npm run build

    - name: Deploy to production
      env:
        API_KEY: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}
      run: |
        # Add deployment commands here, e.g., using a script or tool
        echo "Deploying to production..."
        # Example command for deployment (this should be replaced with actual deployment logic)
        curl -X POST https://api.example.com/deploy -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY" -d @deploy.json
